title: Make cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings pass

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Resolve only the strict clippy failures reported by MVP-070. This is a narrow code-maintenance task.
goals: Use the tdd skill discipline for code changes: reproduce the failing check first, make the smallest fixes, then rerun checks.
Replace default() calls for unit structs with direct unit struct construction where clippy reported default-constructed unit struct lints.
Remove the clone-on-copy SecretRedactor clone reported by clippy.
Run cargo fmt --all --check, cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings, and cargo test.
non_goals: Do not change behavior, protocol, provider logic, server endpoints, clients, or docs unless required by the lint fix.
Do not address real editor smoke in this task.
success_criteria: cargo fmt --all --check and cargo test pass.
